description_long: This is a heavyset adult male figure with a broad build, standing with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and loose pants, and wears a prominent orthopedic body brace that wraps around his torso and over one shoulder, secured with a large fastener at the front. The brace appears to be made of a rigid material, likely plastic or composite, and is designed for medical support. His facial features are stern, and his hair is thinning and closely cropped. The shoes are sturdy and practical, suitable for walking on urban surfaces. The overall appearance suggests a pedestrian who may require additional support for mobility.
description: A heavyset adult male wearing a medical body brace, casual clothing, and sturdy shoes, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, full body brace with front fastener, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the body brace and the relaxed hand posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the brace, shirt, and the back of the head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm, side of the brace, and the side profile of the face.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved shirt, loose pants, orthopedic body brace
